title: P(Doom)1 -- Style Review
subtitle: Compare whole style directions across subjects; pick a winner per matrix.

batches.title: Style dials x subjects
batches.note: Each ROW is one style direction -- a single dial pushed from the cozy-grim baseline. Read across a row to see a whole style rendered on several subjects at once (not one style over-tuned off one object). Pick the winning row, then we regenerate the full set in that direction.

styles.label: + Heavy outline
styles.note: bold thick black line, chunky graphic

batches.title: Era ladder -- one asset, startup to endgame
batches.note: The same workstation upgraded across company eras, to feel what 'upgrading your stuff' looks like over a run. Endgame is the eldritch AI terminal wreathed in glowing Bayes-rune notation (priors/posteriors).
